untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (unspecified breakout pattern with ultimate low timing, trend line identification, and pattern height measurement) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The core logic depends on: (1) identifying specific chart patterns and their geometric properties (trend lines, pattern height from top to lower touch), (2) detecting ultimate low occurrence within specific timeframes (33% in week 1, 42% within 2 weeks), and (3) regime-dependent performance characteristics that require pattern classification rather than indicator thresholds. No combination of price, moving average, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, or volume indicators can replicate pattern detection.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally pattern-based and requires visual/structural analysis rather than quantitative indicators. A proper implementation would require: (1) custom pattern recognition logic to identify breakout patterns, (2) trend line computation and pattern height calculation, (3) ultimate low detection within rolling windows, (4) bear vs bull market regime filtering. The placeholder conditions above use simple breakout logic (close crossing previous bar levels) as a minimal approximation only.
